```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.6em 1.2em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;gap:1em;align-items:stretch;">

  <!-- Randomness: three runs, three different paths -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.2em 1.1em 1.05em;border:1px solid rgba(212,95,71,0.22);box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);">
   <div style="height:5.2em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 200 100" style="width:100%;height:100%;" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
     <path d="M12,25 C40,6 62,44 92,20 S150,38 188,14" fill="none" stroke="#D45F47" stroke-width="3.2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9"/>
     <path d="M12,52 C38,76 70,30 102,58 S158,34 188,54" fill="none" stroke="#E8927C" stroke-width="3.2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.85"/>
     <path d="M12,80 C46,62 66,96 98,74 S154,92 188,72" fill="none" stroke="#D45F47" stroke-width="3.2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.45"/>
    </svg>
   </div>
   <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:0.85em;">
    <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;">Randomness</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;color:#A08A78;margin-top:0.4em;letter-spacing:0.04em;">Nature of LLMs</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <!-- vs -->
  <div style="align-self:center;width:2.1em;height:2.1em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFFBF3;border:1px solid #EFE6D6;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.10);">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">VS</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Determinism: three runs, one identical path -->
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.2em 1.1em 1.05em;border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);">
   <div style="height:5.2em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 200 100" style="width:100%;height:100%;" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
     <line x1="12" y1="25" x2="188" y2="25" stroke="#2C8475" stroke-width="3.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
     <line x1="12" y1="50" x2="188" y2="50" stroke="#2C8475" stroke-width="3.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
     <line x1="12" y1="75" x2="188" y2="75" stroke="#2C8475" stroke-width="3.2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </svg>
   </div>
   <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:0.85em;">
    <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Determinism</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;color:#A08A78;margin-top:0.4em;letter-spacing:0.04em;">What we desire</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
